title: Lead Instructional Designer at Skill India Mission Partners

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Skill India Mission Partners
jsonLd.description:
Join the Skill India Mission Partners family as a Instructional Designer in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Skill India Mission Partners:
Skill India Mission Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Skill India Mission Partners!
